summary: Made WorkResultReport creation deterministic and idempotent per assignment. Replaced timestamp-based report_id with a djb2 hash of task_id:agent_id:assignment_id. Added findReportByAssignmentId() and detectReportAnomalies() helpers. Updated task report command to return existing report on duplicate attempts. Added 9 new tests across task-report and task-governance. Updated reports/README.md with the single-report-per-assignment invariant.

verification.command: pnpm --filter @narada2/cli exec vitest run test/commands/task-report.test.ts test/lib/task-governance.test.ts

known_residuals: Historical duplicate reports (e.g., task 485) are not automatically cleaned up.
detectReportAnomalies() is not yet wired into narada task lint or narada task evidence.
